decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id corridor_nostrand-avenue. Source 201111_nostrand_cb1_slides is listed as a source_id for this record, and the limits (Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay), boroughs (Brooklyn, Manhattan), and street names (Nostrand Ave/Rogers Ave) all match the existing registry record corridor_nostrand-avenue.
